ddls:
CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "icb_ons_code" TEXT /* ICB ONS code for the location */,
  "sub_icb_location_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub ICB location */,
  "service_setting" TEXT /* Type of service setting for the appointment */,
  "context_type" TEXT /* Type of context for the appointment */,
  "national_category" TEXT /* National category for the appointment */,
  "count_of_appointments" INTEGER /* Count of appointments for that day */,
  "appointment_month" TEXT /* Month of the appointment in YYYY-MM format */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the appointment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the appointment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_context_type FOREIGN KEY ("context_type") REFERENCES context_types ("context_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_service_setting FOREIGN KEY ("service_setting") REFERENCES service_settings ("service_setting_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_national_category FOREIGN KEY ("national_category") REFERENCES national_categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_icb_ons_code FOREIGN KEY ("icb_ons_code") REFERENCES locations ("icb_ons_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "icb_ons_code" TEXT /* ICB ONS code for the location */,
  "sub_icb_location_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub ICB location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icb_ons_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_settings" (
  "service_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service setting */,
  "service_setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the service setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the service setting */,
  "service_setting_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "context_types" (
  "context_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each context type */,
  "context_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the context type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the context type */,
  "context_type_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the context type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("context_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "national_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each national category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the national category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the national category */,
  "category_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the national category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointment_counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for appointment count entries */,
  "icb_ons_code" TEXT /* ICB ONS code for the location */,
  "appointment_month" TEXT /* The month for which appointments are counted */,
  "total_appointments" INTEGER /* Total number of appointments for the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the history record */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appointment being modified */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* Value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_history_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification setting entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the settings belong */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user wants email notifications */,
  "sms_notifications" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user wants SMS notifications */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Detailed notification preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the provider */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the provider */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualifications of the provider */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the appointment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the appointment type entails */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of the appointment type in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointment_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the reminder */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appointment being reminded */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date of the reminder */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time of the reminder */,
  "sent_via" TEXT /* Method via which the reminder was sent (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointment_reminders_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appointment being reviewed */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the patient (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_feedback_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id")
)
